# Sunbeam Market Collective — Brand Guide (v0.1)

## Palette
- Sun Yellow: #FBBF24
- Deep Green: #1F3D2B
- Off-white: #F7F5F0
- Slate: #64748B

## Voice
- Bright, helpful, specific.
- Avoid hype. Prefer “what it is” + “why it’s good”.

## Known drift
- Meal-kit pilot name varies across teams.
- Promo naming is inconsistent.
